title: Scale platform
abstract: The present application provides a scale platform. The scale platform includes a first transceiver for communicating with a mobile device using a first communication protocol, a second transceiver for communicating with at least one kitchen devices using a second communication protocol; and an electronic unit coupled with the first transceiver and the second transceiver. The first transceiver is configured to receive a first data from the mobile device, and the electronic unit is configured to obtain weight of ingredients to be processed by the at least one kitchen devices and process the first data based on the weight of ingredients in order to control the process of the at least one kitchen devices via the second transceiver. In addition with the second transceiver in the scale platform, functions and/or parameters are optimized in the connected kitchen devices to achieve tasty results based on the recipe chosen.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A scale platform (120), comprising: a first transceiver (122) for communicating with a mobile device (110) using a first communication protocol; a second transceiver (126) for communicating with at least one kitchen device (130) using a second communication protocol; and an electronic unit (124) coupled with the first transceiver (122) and the second transceiver (126), wherein the first transceiver (122) is configured to receive a first data from the mobile device (110) which data is a recipe having one or more ingredients and one or more target amounts for the ingredients, and the electronic unit (124) is configured to: obtain weights of ingredients to be processed by the at least one kitchen device (130) and process the first data based on the weight of ingredients in order to control the process of the at least one kitchen device (130) via the second transceiver (126), wherein the electronic unit (124) is configured to adapt the one or more target amounts in the recipe based on the weight of ingredients and optimize one or more control parameters based on the adapted target amounts, or to receive adapted target amounts in the recipe based on the weight of ingredients and optimized control parameters based on the adapted target amounts, and wherein the electronic unit (124) is adapted to send the control parameters from the electronic unit (124) via the second transceiver to the at least one kitchen device (130) to control the process of the at least one kitchen devices (130). 2. The scale platform (120) of claim 1, further comprising: a weight scale (128) for measuring weight of ingredients to be processed by the at least one kitchen devices (130), wherein the electronic unit (124) is configured to receive measured weight from the weight scale (128). 3. The scale platform (120) of claim 1 or 2, wherein the electronic unit (124) is further configured to send the adapted target amounts to the mobile device (110) for display. 4. The scale platform (120) of any preceding claim, wherein the electronic unit (124) is configured to retrieve nutritional value of the ingredients through internet (140). 5. The scale platform (120) of any preceding claim, further comprising: a display, coupled with the electronic unit, for displaying weight and/or nutritional value of the ingredients. 6. The scale platform (120) of any preceding claim, wherein the second transceiver (126) is configured to receive a second data from the at least one kitchen devices (130), indicating at least one of the following parameters of the at least one kitchen devices (130): working duration, temperature, humidity, pressure and rotation speed. 7. The scale platform (120) of claim 6, wherein the second transceiver (126) is configured to send the second data to the first transceiver (122), which in turn sends the second data to the mobile device (110). 8. The scale platform (120) of any preceding claim, wherein the first data comprises control instructions, which are sent to the electronic unit (124) via the first transceiver (122), and wherein the electronic unit (124) is further configured to send the control instructions to the at least one kitchen devices (130) via the second transceiver (126). 9. The scale platform (120) of claim 8, wherein the electronic unit (124) is configured to verify suitability of at least some of the control instructions. 10. The scale platform (120) of any preceding claim, wherein the second communication protocol is different to the first communication protocol. 11. A cutting board (200) incorporating the scale platform (120) according to any one of claims 1-10, wherein the surface (210) of the cutting board is washable.
